characters.appearance: A young man in his early 20s with a slim build and a medium brown complexion. He has short, styled black hair, a well-defined mustache, and a light beard. His facial features are sharp.
characters.wardrobe: A short-sleeved t-shirt with wide horizontal stripes in teal and dark blue, paired with dark grey jeans. He wears a silver-colored chain bracelet on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially casual and questioning, becomes surprised, and finally appears happy and decisive.

characters.appearance: A young woman in her early 20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, dark brown, wavy hair, typically parted in the middle. She has soft, delicate facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A long, magenta-colored dress with short puffed sleeves and a subtle white embroidered pattern on the bodice.
characters.demeanor: Appears thoughtful and concerned initially, then becomes confident and persuasive.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 20s with a medium build and a fair complexion. He has thick, perfectly coiffed black hair and is clean-shaven with a hint of stubble. He has a friendly, trustworthy smile.
characters.wardrobe: A black collared shirt, with a prominent and futuristic-looking silver and black robotic collar piece around his neck.
characters.demeanor: Professional, charismatic, and persuasive, speaking directly to the audience.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: हम रोज़ चाय-नाश्ते और scrolling में कितना time और पैसा waste कर देते हैं ना? [We waste so much time and money on tea, snacks, and scrolling daily, right?]
Character B says: हाँ, लेकिन जब English सीखने की बात आती है, तो हमें लगता है कि बहुत expensive होगा। [Yes, but when it comes to learning English, we think it will be very expensive.]
Character A says: Coaching classes और tutors की fees सुनकर ही डर लगता है। [Just hearing the fees of coaching classes and tutors is scary.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by comparing everyday frivolous spending to the perceived high cost of learning.
- Establishes the core problem: learners want to improve but feel priced out by traditional coaching.
- Uses relatable, code-mixed Hindi to build immediate rapport.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
चाय-नाश्ते और scrolling में पैसा waste? (Wasting money on tea, snacks, and scrolling?)
English सीखना expensive लगता है? (Learning English feels expensive?)
Coaching fees बहुत costly है। (Coaching fees are very costly.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character C says: चाय-नाश्ता तो 5 मिनट में खत्म हो जाता है। क्यों ना अपने career के लिए एक skill में invest करें? Supernova app के साथ आप रोज़ AI tutor से English speaking practice कर सकते हैं। Interview हो या office, basic से confident English तक। [Tea and snacks finish in 5 minutes. Why not invest in a skill for your career? With the Supernova app, you can practice English speaking daily with an AI tutor. Whether it's an interview or office, from basic to confident English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the Supernova solution as a practical, long-term investment in oneself.
- Highlights key features: AI tutor, daily practice, and real-world scenarios (interviews, office).
- Shifts the emotion from hesitation to empowerment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Skill में invest करें (Invest in a skill)
Supernova App
Daily AI Tutor Practice (Daily AI Tutor Practice)
Basic से Confident English (From Basic to Confident English)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इतने affordable price में daily speaking practice? [Daily speaking practice at such an affordable price?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल! चाय खत्म हो जाती है, लेकिन English बोलने का confidence life-time साथ रहता है। [Exactly! Tea gets finished, but the confidence to speak English stays with you for a lifetime.]
Character A says: और मैं फालतू चीज़ों में पैसे waste कर रहा था। [And I was wasting money on useless things.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the affordability of the app without stating a specific price.
- Reinforces the lifetime value of speaking English confidently.
- Shows the protagonist realizing the value, prompting the viewer to feel the same.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Affordable Price में Daily Practice (Daily Practice at an Affordable Price)
Confidence life-time साथ रहता है (Confidence stays for a lifetime)
पैसे waste मत करो (Don't waste money)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: आज ही शुरुआत करें। [Start today.]
Character A & B says: हम तो आज ही Supernova start कर रहे हैं। [We are starting Supernova today itself.]
Unknown speaker: हज़ारों की fees नहीं, बस Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Not thousands in fees, just practice daily with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, urgent Call to Action (CTA).
- Shows social proof through the protagonists' immediate adoption.
- Leaves the viewer with a final reminder of affordability and daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
आज ही शुरुआत करें (Start today)
We are starting Supernova today
हज़ारों की fees नहीं, रोज़ practice करो (Not thousands in fees, practice daily)
